title: Hasselquistia carmeli
taxonomy: Hasselquistia carmeli is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. Hasselquistia carmeli is named after the Swedish botanist Pehr Osbeck's assistant, Erik Hasselquist. The plant is often used as an ornamental due to its attractive foliage and flowers. Hasselquistia carmeli is classified in the genus Hasselquistia, which is a monotypic genus.
